---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for MCP-Lattice
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the gap you have identified. What is frustrating or missing in the current version of MCP-Lattice?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution. Be as specific as possible about what you want MCP-Lattice to do differently.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you have considered and why the proposed solution is preferable.

## Use Case

Describe the concrete scenario where this feature would be used. For example:

- "As a security engineer, I want to ... so that ..."
- "When scanning a multi-server configuration, I need to ... because ..."

## Impact

Which area of MCP-Lattice does this affect?

- [ ] Detection engine (pattern, semantic, or capability graph)
- [ ] Config discovery (new client support or config format)
- [ ] MCP connectivity (new transport or protocol feature)
- [ ] Output and reporting (new format or report improvement)
- [ ] CLI interface (new flags, subcommands, or UX)
- [ ] Template system (new schema features or template tooling)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I am willing to submit a pull request implementing this feature.
- [ ] I can help with testing but not implementation.
- [ ] I am requesting this feature but cannot contribute to the implementation.

## Additional Context

Any additional information, mockups, examples, or references that help explain the feature request.
